title: RNA dataset.
author: Kazanskii, Maksim
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This dataset is used in the investigation of the RNA tertiary strucure in https://doi.org/10.1101/2024.06.18.599511 (AutoRNA: RNA tertiary structure prediction using variational autoencoder). The folder contains files have a *.ent format archived with ZIP.
steps_raw: This dataset is used in the investigation of the RNA tertiary strucure in https://doi.org/10.1101/2024.06.18.599511 (AutoRNA: RNA tertiary structure prediction using variational autoencoder). The folder contains files have a *.ent format archived with ZIP.
